programme.title: Lost And Found
programme.desc: Following the work of Dogs Trust, one of Britain's best-loved dog rescue charities, as they find new homes for unwanted and abandoned dogs.

programme.title: Dog School
programme.desc: In Warrington, we meet Henry the Labrador, one of day care’s livelier dogs. The staff has to restrict his play because he is a little overweight and too much exercise is bad for his joints.

programme.title: Pet Heroes
programme.desc: An ornery mare has a soft spot for a hurt and scared young horse; an injured dog struggles to care for her young pups during a harsh prairie winter.

programme.title: Dogs with Jobs
programme.desc: Willy: Seizure dog (St. Helen, Michigan) - Joanne Weber suffers from epilepsy. Her life is transformed when Willy, a golden lab, enters her life.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Duck chases young boy around yard and takes him down; cow has an itch: finds a way to get a good scratch; cowboy lassos horse that just stands there and doesn't run.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Middle Eastern oilman Farouk, anxious for vengeance against Blake, tells Nick that Carrington is responsible for the death of his brother. Nick attacks Blake, who is left unconscious at the bottom of a deep ravine.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle finds Blake in the mountains and gets him to the hospital. Nick Toscanni disappears. Cecil is also brought to the hospital, and he's very weak. A police investigation is started to find the baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Michael goes to Denver to find out who he is. Alexis and Cecil plan a wedding in the hospital. Claudia disappears and Blake suspects her of kidnapping the baby. There's an exciting drama on the roof of a tall building.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The baby is recovered from the real kidnapper, Alfred Grimes, and it turns out he's the father of Roger Grimes. Fallon fires Susan. Claudia leaves for a sanitarium. Fallon starts looking for a job. Blake gives her his hotel La Mirada.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Cecil leaves his estate and Colbyco to Jeff and Alexis. He also reveals his "Rhinewood" game to Blake at the reading of his will. Blake suspects Alexis of being a part of it.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gives her newfound long-lost son Adam a job at Colbyco. Blake starts to believe that Adam may actually be his real son. Fallon and Adam keep flirting with each other, not knowing they are siblings. Adam has dinner with Krystle and Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake tries to be friends with Adam, but Adam rejects him. Alexis tells Mark that he's still married to Krystle. Mark seeks to get a job as a tennis pro at Fallon's hotel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Joseph's daughter, Kirby comes to stay with the Carringtons after breaking up with her fiance in France. Joseph tries to persuade her to go back to him. Mark gets the job at Fallon's hotel. Blake tries to get help from Congressman Neal McVane.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with the so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Indonesia but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior. Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one moving boat to another. Climb into fishing boat tank filled with dead squid and retrieve weights from the bottom. Contestants shimmy out on a flag pole that is approximately 20 feet from the building, free the flag and shimmy back.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parent and the child will have to cross a beam above the water releasing flags along the way. Cockroaches are being poured into the box while the child sits in a box without a top. In this family stunt the child will start by standing on the dock.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants are trapped in cars that are each suspended by cranes opposing each other. The female contestant will be locked to a conveyer belt that will be lowered into a shaft filled with hundreds of webs crawling with thousands of tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will exit a helicopter and release a flag. They will be standing on platforms suspended in the air. Contestant must chew through the cow intestine. Contestants will ride a mini motorcycle across a beam that is suspended from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Joe Rogan, in a crowd of fans, counts down the top 15 stunts from all the shows up till this point.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will both start on a SeaDoo as they speed towards a buoy, jump off at the buoy, grab a floating fire extinguisher, and swim to a platform behind a house boat that is on fire. One contestant will be placed in a Plexiglas box filled with bugs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Child contestant will be standing on top of the light tower while the parent is hanging from a helicopter. The parent contestant will be peddling a stationary bicycle. The child is standing on the roof and their parent is navigating through a maze.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must get on a pole directly out, under the nose of a helicopter. Players will bob in cheese and then eat grasshoppers. Contestants are hung upside down into a Plexiglas tank filled with Eels. Contestants must drive up with only two wheels.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will walk across a truss suspended above the ground wearing a chain mail suit. Contestants will shoot a flaming arrow from a cross bow at a scarecrow target. Contestant is secured into an upright coffin, filled with bugs.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant will fire a starter's pistol and run from an attack dog. The contestants will lie in a pit made up of faux rocks and burlap. A 6 and a half inch wide beam is suspended over 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.desc: Abajo, en Big Easy, el chef Ramsay intenta inyectar algo de vida en un restaurante sureño acosado por una decoración y menús atroces. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a algunos de los restaurantes para ver si siguieron su consejo. Los restaurantes que visita incluyen Mojito, The Junction y Bazzini. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a Lido di Manhattan, Anna Vincenzo's y Le Bistro para ver si los propietarios han implementado sus cambios. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.desc: Lela's es un restaurante exclusivo que desesperadamente necesita más clientela.

programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita el Finn McCool's manejado por una familia en Westhampton, Nueva York, y se enfrenta a un detestable jefe de cocina que resulta ser el hijo del propietario.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others. But when they discover blood spatter in her boyfriend's bedroom, they know this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man — until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost of Carnegie
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to the Carnegie Library of Homestead, in Pennsylvania to investigate a site that once held violent riots between legendary capitalist, Mr. Carnegie and the steel workers. It is believed that Mr.Carnegie still haunts the library.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Harvesting Murder
programme.desc: A sugar plantation worker tied his daughter to a bed and went to work. Unable to escape, she died in a fire. Claims from the staff of Hawaii's Plantation Village in Waipahu.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Well of Horror
programme.desc: TAPS is joined by Jason's daughter, Haily, on two cases; The Shanley Hotel in Napanoch, New York and Old Fort Niagara, in Youngstown, New York. Both cases involve a gruesome death that took place at a well, instigating paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts
programme.desc: The TAPS team is the first paranormal team to ever investigate the famed Friar's Club in New York City. Next, the team travels to the Main Street Armory in Rochester, New York.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain
programme.desc: On this episode TAPS heads back to the fan favorite; Waverly Hills Sanatorium in Louisville, Kentucky, an abandoned tuberculosis hospital haunted by its former patients and staff.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Distillery of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Buffalo Trace Distillery in Frankfort, Kentucky to investigate hauntings at the oldest operating distillery in America.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Membership Denied
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Hartford, CT to Elks Lodge, the oldest and largest secret fraternal organizations in the country. Elks Lodge #19 is shrouded in mystery and tragedy with a gruesome death hanging over its head....and decades of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: TAPS gets into the spirit with an investigation of Bethlehem, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roller Ghoster
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS heads to Ohio to investigate Kings Island, anamusement park that sits on land that was thesite of an awful accident.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Naples, New York, to investigate the Naples Hotel.This hotel was built in 1895.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos compiten para hacer la mayor cantidad posible de pasta para la cena de la noche, y un accidente en la cocina lleva a un competidor al hospital.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío para los once Chefs restantes: hacer una pizza gourmet. Los ganadores disfrutan de hamburguesas gourmet en Santa Bárbara mientras los perdedores preparan la cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los diez Chefs restantes complazcan a una adolescente exigente que vino a Hell's Kitchen para celebrar su fiesta de cumpleaños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay hace que los nueve Chefs restantes se sometan a una prueba de sabor con los ojos vendados. Los ganadores pueden ir a un spa; los perdedores deben limpiar la habitación.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay pide un voluntario para cambiar de bando. La dinámica del grupo cambia a medida que los equipos enfrentan su próximo desafío: crear cuatro platos con veinte ingredientes específicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Eagle of Helazard from a luxury cruise ship, but Fujiko betrays them at the last moment and makes off with the Eagle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon has been thrown into prison for a crime he did not commit. He is charged with cutting off the Little Mermaid's arm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious army steals 3 tons worth of gold under Inspector Zenigata's watch. His superiors are convinced Lupin stole the gold and holds Inspector Zenigata responsible.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has lottery fever, or to be specific, has his eyes set on the 50 million dollar jackpot. However, Lupin discovers the lottery is rigged.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/23/88 - The Yankees headed to the bottom of the 9th down 4-3 to the Red Sox. Rickey Henderson helped orchestrate the tying run and give New York hope. Bases loaded and two outs, Claudell Washington scored the winning run on an error by Jody Reed.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/7/52: Mickey Mantle's 6th inning home run and Billy Martin's game-saving catch help the New York Yankees win their 4th straight World Series, beating the Brooklyn Dodgers in 7 games.

programme.title: MLB 25: Greatest Postseason Home Runs
programme.desc: From some of the game's biggest stars to the most unlikely of heroes, these players have etched themselves in baseball history with memorable postseason home runs. Who gets your pick for the Greatest Postseason Home Run ever?

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/65: Sandy Koufax finishes a complete-game shutout in Game 7 of the 1965 World Series to bring home a championship. The Dodgers' 2-0 victory was capped in the top of the 4th inning when runs scored on a homer and an RBI single.

programme.title: MLB Docs
programme.desc: Hunter Pence won two World Series titles with the Giants and over his 12-year career appeared in four All-Star Games. After a tough 2018 season in San Francisco, it seemed unlikely Pence would return to the Majors until he was able to recreate his game.

programme.title: Fenway Park 100 Years
programme.desc: Fenway Park first opened on April 20, 1912 and since then has been known for its unique features and historic moments. Current and former Red Sox players share their experiences playing in one of baseball's greatest ballparks.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/70: After allowing three runs in the 1st inning, Mike Cuellar silenced the Reds over the next eight frames to pitch a complete game. The Orioles offense backed his start, scoring nine runs on 15 hits to take Game 5 and win the 1970 World Series.

programme.title: MST3K: The Beast Of Yucca Flats

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.desc: Rosaura ve a Sonia y comienza a gritar, después choca contra un poste Jimena le dice a Iván que en la vida de ellos hay una realidad que es Adriana y Guillermo. Rosaura recupera el conocimiento.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio amenaza a Silvano con una pistola. Rodrigo llega a casa de Karina. Ella le dice que quiere curarse para mejorar y para quererlo. Luis Mario le cuelga el teléfono a Griselda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia aconseja a Patricio que encierre a Rosaura en un manicomio. Luis Mario y Maribella se besan y Luis Mario la llama Rosaura. Jimena le dice a Guillermo que prepare todo para el matrimonio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Teobaldito y Mairita hablan de sus familias cuando llega Rosaura con regalos para la niña, que supone es hermana del niño. Después llega Luis Mario, que viene a traerle merienda a los chicos.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Gaviota le pregunta a Paco si perdió a su hijo para salvar su vida. Sharon es internada en un hospital psiquiátrico. Fedora descubre que tiene las piernas paralizadas.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana le dice a Maximiliano que Marcela está embarazada. El doctor le informa a Rodrigo que Fedora necesita un largo tratamiento para poder recuperarse.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano le dice a Marcela frente a Diana que no la piensa abandonar. El doctor les informa que Fedora será dada de alta. Octavia ataca a Yolanda e intenta matarla.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Tras haber perdido a su hijo, Marcela da por terminada la relación entre ella y Maximiliano. Yolanda confiesa todos los crímenes de Octavia ante la policía.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot y Willy discuten, pues él sospecha de Morgana y Margot sospecha de Mariana, las que pudieron haber sido, las que atentaron contra su vida. A fin de cuentas, Margot consigue que Willy se disculpe.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana y Willy se despiden para siempre con un beso. Margot entra en ese momento y Mariana aclara que se trata de un último beso, porque no volverán a verse. Mariana va a volver a la universidad.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana le dice a Luciano de sus sospechas, de que Esteban es quien intentó asesinar a Willy. Ella también le dice que él es amante de Margot, que accede a esta relación bajo chantaje.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Natalia, toma veneno para lograr el perdón de Ricardo. Ricardo viendo que está tan enferma, se conmueve y la recibe junto a Mariana. Consiguen salvarla y él le pide a su padre que le permita regresar a su hogar.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami enters the mist on a mission to save her mates – and maybe hunt for treasure while she’s at it. The local mayor wants her dead, but the Straw Hats are being protected by a mysterious marine.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The showdown with Mayor Wetton builds towards an explosive finale as the Straw Hats scramble to escape the Rainbow Mist – or be trapped inside forever.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are nearly crushed by the falling wreckage of a ship that’s over 200 years old. Could rumors of a floating island in the sky be true? Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji go scuba diving to find out!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Still searching for a route to the island in the sky, the Straw Hats chart a course for Jaya. Meanwhile, Fire-Fist Ace crashes a party aboard a vessel helmed by Buggy the Pirate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats drop anchor at a town overrun by scallywags, so Nami makes the boys swear to stay out of trouble. But when the Bellamy Pirates come looking for a fight, Luffy may have to break his promise!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico’s handy work unearths a solitary dreamer who may know the way to Sky Island. All Luffy and his crew have to do is survive the sonic onslaught of simian salvagers seeking to sink the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates reach the home of Mont Blanc Cricket: the man with the key to reaching Sky Island. There’s just one tiny problem – he comes from a long line of legendary liars.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Montblanc Cricket agrees to help the Straw Hats reach Sky Island, but first they must venture deep into the darkest depths of a spider-infested forest to capture a mysterious bird with a keen sense of direction.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats battle creepy-crawly forest creatures on their quest to capture a South Bird, Mont Blanc and his monkey minions are brutally attacked by the Bellamy Pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy turned the other cheek during his first encounter with Bellamy, but now he’s out to settle the score for old man Mont Blanc. Meanwhile, a fearsome pirate crew takes aim at the Straw Hats, eager to earn a bad reputation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to some modifications to the Going Merry, the Straw Hats are on their way to that island in the sky! But with the Blackbeard Pirates in hot pursuit, navigating the vertical currents will be anything but easy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Reaching the sea of clouds proves easier than surviving in it when giant sea creatures attack the Going Merry, Usopp nearly drowns in a cloud, and a strange sky knight issues the Straw Hats a warning!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After hitching a ride on a speedy shrimp, the Straw Hats reach the land of Skypiea! The intrepid pirates have much to learn about their new surroundings, but a beautiful angel makes a perfect tour guide.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s eagerness to explore the forbidden realm of Upper Yard brings her face to face with the wrath of god, and the Straw Hats incur Heaven’s Judgment for failing to pay their immigration fees!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are no strangers to living on the wrong side of the law, but unpaid immigration fees and Nami’s assault of a White Beret earns Luffy’s crew a sentence of death by cloud drifting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Zoro, Chopper, and Robin are trapped aboard the Going Merry when it’s commandeered by a monstrous lobster! To rescue his crew, Luffy must venture onto the sacred grounds of Upper Yard!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Conis helps Luffy and his mates launch their rescue mission, but the rubber-man senses something amiss. When he presses her for answers, a vengeful god takes a shot at the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro dukes it out with a hungry Skyshark in the shadow of the Sacrificial Alter. On the other side of Upper Yard, Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp try to survive their visit to an island that wants them dead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp tangle with Satori and his exploding, snake-filled Surprise Clouds. The sky priest may look like a dancing dango, but the impact of his mantra leaves the pirates bloodied and boatless.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Sanji try to regain control of the Crow, and Luffy stirs up a brutal barrage of bursting balls when he attacks Satori. Meanwhile, Chopper whistles for the Sky Knight to avoid becoming a sacrificial reindeer!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper fights bravely to stop Shura from incinerating the Going Merry, but the little reindeer is no match for a sky priest. Gan Fall is on his way, but will the dispossessed deity arrive in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Gan Fall is badly burned during his battle with Shura, Chopper musters the courage for a death-defying leap of faith. Elsewhere, Luffy may have finally discovered a way to defeat Satori!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Shandorians prepare for an all-out attack on their priestly adversaries, Chopper meets the mysterious creatures that saved his life, and Nami makes an astonishing discovery about the origins of Upper Yard.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Shandorians continue their battle for control of Upper Yard, the Straw Hats celebrate their happy reunion by swapping stories over a campfire and feasting on barbequed Skyshark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Laki’s pursuit of precious Vearth causes one of her Shandorian comrades to be injured during the battle with Ohm. As night falls on Upper Yard, the Straw Hats dream of gold while dancing with wolves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The electrifying deity of Skypiea, God Eneru, grants his priests unlimited power in their hunt for the Straw Hats. Usopp has a plan to get the mysteriously-repaired Going Merry back in the water, but it involves using Chopper as bait!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats scatter when their search for gold uncovers a giant python, and Gan Fall reveals the tragic story of Jaya’s arrival in the sky. Meanwhile, Wyper readies the Shandorians for a raid on Eneru’s shrine!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan finds a space station full of kids who believe he is there to bring peace by killing their enemies. He is manipulated into unlocking his weapons locker.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew of Andromeda is still learning how to work together as they are attacked by the Restorers.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda gets involved in a feud between a Than planet and a Nietzschean colony. Tyr must choose between his clan or his new family aboard the Andromeda.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A slipstream sends the Andromeda back in time to just before the Commonwealth fell. The crew must intervene to preserve history.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Answering a distress call leads the crew to pick up Beka's brother, now a Wayist, and his friend. They are connected to environmentalists trying to prevent space travel.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A black hole allows Dylan to communicate with his former fiancee, 300 years in the past. He can't abandon his mission to reform the Commonwealth, but can he bring her into the future?

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Instinct
programme.desc: Johnny and Walt (Chris Bruno) investigate the sudden violent behavior of the animals around Cleaves Mills while Reverend Purdy (David Ogden Stiers) wrestles with his faith and past decisions.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Shadows
programme.desc: When Johnny foresees the death of someone very close to him, he must confront his inner demons before they push him to the brink of murder.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Tipping Point
programme.desc: As problems with his dead zone become life threatening, Johnny must decide whether to have brain surgery, knowing he might lose his psychic abilities that may help prevent Armageddon.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Pablo and Kelly notice something ominous between the Book and Brujo's pendant. Ash promises to visit Lem, but Fisher shows up for an almighty showdown with her former boss.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, Pablo and Kelly, now joined by Fisher, arrive at the survivalist camp in the midst of chaos and must go to extreme measures to escape. Meanwhile, more is revealed of Ruby's mission.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash attempts to bury the book to end the Evil, but first he must contend with other, more physical things from his past. Fisher faces a horrific change in Ash.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash battles someone all too familiar, and later hears a message from the Necronomicon. Meanwhile, the deadliest Deadite attacks.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: With Adam on lockdown at the Sanctuary, Magnus investigates his connection to Hollow Earth – and Druitt – while being forced to reveal dark secrets about the chaotic origins of the Five.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will releases Adam in an effort to cure Magnus...and find the hidden city.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a prominent attorney is found savagely stabbed to death in her office, investigators find themselves with a long list of suspects from violent felons to lesbian love triangles; in the end, they find a killer as cold as they come.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What originally looks like a heart attack turns out to be a calculated execution; soon, detectives unravel a murder plot that hits a little too close to home.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: After a woman is found shot dead, with her 9-month-old daughter in the next room, detectives uncover a web of late-night encounters, secret lovers and seething jealousy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A woman is found stabbed to death in her apartment; with a long list of admirers, investigators uncover secret obsessions leading to a sadistic killer suspected by no one.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is strangled to death in the middle of a Hawaiian paradise; investigators quickly focus in on two suspects, but nothing comes easy as they spend more than a decade striving to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A retired couple are found beaten to death in their country club estate, but detectives soon discover that what happens in Vegas doesn't always stay there as they hunt down this monstrous killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed to death and suspects include a warlock and a rumored Wiccan lover; the case goes unsolved for years, until a triple homicide leads investigators to a dark obsession that costs four people their lives.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A local beauty queen is found dead in a lake; as her small town grieves, law enforcement finds itself on a 20-plus year investigation that leads to a killer who was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: An apartment fire proves to be arson set to cover up the murder of a young woman, but the discovery of a secret double life and unique evidence leads detectives to the killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A witness comes face to face with the killer of a small-town beautician, but despite having an eyewitness, it would take years and a surprise tip to lead detectives to who strangled a beloved member of the community.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Dallas police discover three women murdered with their eyes surgically removed; police believe they have a deranged doctor on the loose until two rookie cops find themselves on the trail of a man with a talent for taxidermy and a hatred for women.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer hijacks the highways of Sacramento as several women are found strangled with their clothing cut into precise but odd patterns; a survivor leads police to a sports car driving deviant posing as a good samaritan to poach potential victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When the Hillside Stranglers are caught police realize they still have another serial killer running rampant in Los Angeles; he tortures and toys with his model victims while keeping pieces of their jewelry as he snaps their last photo ever.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Texas authorities have a killer riding the rails and leaving a literal trail of bread crumbs after eating at victims' tables; when more murders are linked, the FBI names a Most Wanted suspect and a national manhunt for The Railroad Killer ensues.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Minnesota police hunt for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness; no one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun; he taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are out in Kentucky on a different kind of mission. They're going to someone who needs their expertise to make his home unique. The owner is William Shatner, who gives Mike and Frank a very specific list.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While cruising through South Carolina, looking for leads, the guys call an old picking contact and soon find themselves in Bill's main street hardware store. The family business has been operating since the 1880s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Go cruising with the Pawn Stars as they check out a classic 1932 Lincoln roadster. Exceptionally maintained, will Rick and the Old Man strike gold and ride off in this vintage beauty or is the seller not firing on all cylinders?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Run for cover with the Pawn Stars when a World War I helmet blasts into the shop. The first metal helmet used by U.S. forces, will the guys butt heads to buy this piece?

programme.desc: The Pawn Stars consider sending a search party out for Chumlee when he takes off to look at a 1950's Bally's coin operated kiddie ride.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys are dreaming of a California mega score when they stumble upon a salvage yard that's been in a family for generations. The place looks promising...but the owner has never let anyone inside. Can Frank and Mike talk their way in?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank get revved up about an awesome new client: North Carolina's NASCAR Hall of Fame. The curators have asked them to scour the country for relics that help tell the unique history of auto racing.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.desc: An unhappy dentist in Montreal gets a new neighbor, Jimmy 'The Tulip' Teduski, a former mob hitman turned informant with a price on his head.

programme.title: Two for the Money
programme.desc: After suffering a career-ending knee injury, a former college football star aligns himself with one of the most renowned touts in the sports-gambling business.

programme.title: Gang Related
programme.desc: Corrupt detectives Tupac Shakur and James Belushi, having framed an innocent man (Dennis Quaid) for the murder of an undercover DEA agent, find their lives unraveling when they come under the scrutiny of DEA investigator Richard Simms (Gary Cole).

programme.title: Jamesy Boy
programme.desc: Rage-filled teenager James is never one to back down from a fight. He jumps at the chance to run drugs and guns for a gang and quickly ends up behind bars.

programme.title: Event Horizon
programme.desc: In 2047, a team of astronauts embarks on a mission to retrieve a missing spaceship. However, their simple retrieval job leads to something far more terrifying than any of them would suspect.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: Species
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker, and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Species II: Species II
programme.desc: A trio of American astronauts become instant heroes as they plant the Stars and Stripes on Mars before beginning the voyage home. But back on their ship, something else has set its sights on Earth, something whose relatives have already paid us a visit.

programme.title: Event Horizon
programme.desc: In 2047, a team of astronauts embarks on a mission to retrieve a missing spaceship. However, their simple retrieval job leads to something far more terrifying than any of them would suspect.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: Mimic 2
programme.desc: Four years after a terrifying mutation took New York City by surprise, a detective stumbles upon a link between the "mimic" creatures and three grisly new murder victims. The shape-shifting bugs are back.

programme.title: Good Will Hunting
programme.desc: The hit Oscar-winning drama which launched the careers of Matt Damon and Ben Affleck tells the tale of a headstrong, working-class genius who's failing the lessons of life, until he meets a relatable psychology professor (Robin Williams).

programme.title: Woman Walks Ahead
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this riveting western follows a headstrong New York widow (Jessica Chastain) as she journeys west to meet Sioux chief Sitting Bull, facing off with an army officer (Sam Rockwell) intent on war with Native Americans.

programme.title: The Souvenir: Part II
programme.desc: A moving and vibrantly funny story of young adulthood and young love, The Souvenir Part II follows an ambitious film student in 1980s London through an intoxicating world of unpredictable and romantic entanglements.

programme.title: Good Will Hunting
programme.desc: The hit Oscar-winning drama which launched the careers of Matt Damon and Ben Affleck tells the tale of a headstrong, working-class genius who's failing the lessons of life, until he meets a relatable psychology professor (Robin Williams).

programme.title: School Ties
programme.desc: After receiving a scholarship to an exclusive prep school, working-class teen David Greene becomes a star athlete and wins the attention of a beautiful debutante.

programme.title: House of Gucci
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: In this visionary film, Will and Jake Grimm dazzle small towns with their imaginative folklore and elaborate illusions, only to discover many of the fantastic characters, and thrilling situations, found in their beloved fairy tales are real.

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: Julia Child - Cooking with Master Chefs
programme.desc: Susan Feniger and Mary Sue Milliken prepare Thai melon salad, spinach and eggplant curry, and curried popcorn.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: James Beard Award-winning chef Lidia Bastianich makes a savory Grilled Calamari and Shrimp with Salsa Verde and Grilled Bread, which Ming matches with Blue Ginger Crispy Calamari and Thai-Lime Dipping Sauce. It’s the best of frutti di mare!

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: It’s time for coconut with Carla Hall, co-host of The Chew! Carla makes Calaloo—a Crab and Coconut Spinach Soup—and Cassava in Coconut Sauce while Ming counters with a Creamless Watercress Soup with Honey Apple Salsa and Coconut Shrimp.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag sears Pork Chops with Crispy Pancetta, while Ming whips up a Pork Scaloppini with Lap Chong and Leek Salsa, and Caramelized Apples.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Top Chef alum Tiffani Faison head outside to make some Grilled Tandoori Chicken with a Fresh Tomato and Herb Salad. Meanwhile, Ming cooks up a Tea-Smoked Whole Chicken with Sweet Potatoes and a Fermented Black Bean Pesto.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Uber-chef Carla Hall, co-host of The Chew, stops by to give a fresh take on a shrimp classic. Pulling from her Southern roots, Chef Hall creates a delicious Sea Island Shrimp with Grits while Ming cooks up a Shrimp and Squash Grit Tempura.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Chef Sara Moulton, a protege of Julia Child, joins Ming in the kitchen to make some family comfort food. Sara slow cooks a flavorful Alsatian Onion Pie, and Ming follows with one of his Sunday night favorites, French Onion Apple Soup.

programme.title: Mary Berry Everyday
programme.desc: Mary travels to Scotland to enjoy the best of their everyday larder with recipes inspired by her own Scots heritage. She shares the joy of venison cooked on a BBQ with chef Tom Kitchin.

programme.title: Mary Berry Everyday
programme.desc: Mary shares inspiring everyday dishes full of wholesome goodness from her secret tip for a rich bolognaise to a heart-warming soup.

programme.title: Mary Berry Everyday
programme.desc: Mary opens her garden to host a village fete and shares her brilliant flair for turning easy dishes into spectacular crowd-pleasers.

programme.title: Mary Berry Everyday
programme.desc: This is indulgence at its best with Mary’s mouth-watering dishes that give the every day a lift with lashings of naughtiness.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: As Pati travels with her TV production crew through Mexico’s vast state of Sonora, she’s inspired by the bold flavors and ingredients. They stop at a hacienda outside of Hermosillo, where Pati prepares her take on a true Sonoran feast.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Occult History of the Third Reich

programme.title: Inside The Tower of London: Crimes, Conspiracies, Confessions
programme.desc: Alice Tankerville and her attempts to woo her way out of trouble with a prison guard; how Watt Tyler led the only force to storm the Tower; and how the legend grew that if you took the Tower you took the country.

programme.title: Inside The Tower of London: Crimes, Conspiracies, Confessions
programme.desc: The Princess in the Tower, who lost their lives in mysterious circumstances; evil Judge Jeffries and how he came to regret his actions, and the larger-than-life Colonel Blood, who remains the only person to steal the Crown Jewels.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week we're helping a young mother achieve her dream of moving back to Ireland. Sue Wessell longs to return to the place where she grew up and has persuaded husband Chris and their two children to up sticks and relocate to the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil come to the aid of newly qualified doctor Ian Ensum, as he takes his first steps on the property ladder.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Despite a slowdown in the housing market, property is still very much headline news, and we love it! But, finding that all singing, all dancing dream home is tougher than ever!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Armed with the house-hunters' requirements, laptops and a surgical link to their mobile phones, Kirstie and Phil blitz the market looking for that perfect new place.

programme.title: Candice Tells All
programme.desc: There comes a time when every homeowner must eventually face a kitchen renovation. Some kitchens are in dire need of a complete overhaul, while others are salvageable. At first glance, Ilya and Pina’s kitchen seems to be a lost cause...

programme.title: Candice Tells All
programme.desc: Contrast is one of the essential principles of good design and it’s the one Candice chooses to transform a young couple’s dated and cavernous basement into a modern and functional entertainment space...

programme.title: The Final Girls
programme.desc: A young woman grieving the loss of her mother, a famous scream queen from the 1980s, finds herself pulled into the world of her mom's most famous movie. Reunited, the women must fight off the film's maniacal killer.

programme.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
programme.desc: Sally moves to Rhode Island to live with her father and his new girlfriend in their 19th-century mansion. While exploring the house, Sally starts to hear voices coming from creatures in the basement whose hidden agenda is to claim her as one of their own.

programme.title: The Exorcism of Emily Rose
programme.desc: A thrilling horror film about a lawyer (Linney), who takes on a negligent homicide case involving a priest (Wilkinson) who performed an exorcism on a young girl.

programme.title: I See You
programme.desc: Helen Hunt stars in the mind-twisting psychological thriller. The lead investigator on a missing persons case struggles to balance work and home life. But when the family is put in mortal danger, an evil truth about their home is finally uncovered.

programme.title: The Last Exorcism Part II
programme.desc: Nell is back in the safety of civilization and sent to live in a group home where she's encouraged to leave her past behind and start a new life. Just as Nell settles in, she is tormented by the seductive demonic presence that once possessed her.

programme.title: We Are What We Are
programme.desc: The Parkers, reclusive people who cling to ancient customs, find their secret lives threatened when a torrential downpour and the death of the family matriarch forces daughters Iris and Rose to assume special responsibilities.

programme.title: The Haunting In Connecticut
programme.desc: After a family is forced to relocate for their son's health, they begin experiencing supernatural behavior in their new home, which turns out to be a former mortuary and séance parlor.

programme.title: Ask the Dust
programme.desc: Arturo Bandini, a young would-be writer who comes to Depression-era Los Angeles to make a name for himself. While there, he meets beautiful barmaid Camilla, a Mexican immigrant who hopes for a better life by marrying a wealthy American.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: In the Time of the Butterflies
programme.desc: Salma Hayek gives a powerful, passionate performance as an idealistic young woman who wages a daring struggle for freedom against a murderous dictator (Edward James Olmos) in this moving thriller that tells of the personal toll of political tyranny.

programme.title: Fled
programme.desc: A witty and fast-paced Action Adventure, Fled tracks two prison escapes on the lam as they race against time to find a hidden cache of cash and an incriminating computer disk that could either bring down the Cuban Mafia or get the two killed.

programme.title: Ask the Dust
programme.desc: Arturo Bandini, a young would-be writer who comes to Depression-era Los Angeles to make a name for himself. While there, he meets beautiful barmaid Camilla, a Mexican immigrant who hopes for a better life by marrying a wealthy American.

programme.title: Bliss
programme.desc: In this mind-bending love story a recently divorced (and fired) man meets the mysterious Isabel, a woman who is living on the streets and is utterly convinced that the polluted, broken world around them is just an elaborate computer simulation.

programme.title: The Pallbearer
programme.desc: Nothing like death to put some life into romance: a hapless 25-year-old's fortunes change when he is a pallbearer for someone he doesn't know. David Schwimmer, Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: When a rockslide pins Warren and prevents him from moving, he must hold out in hopes that his friend Geert will climb down the mountain and return with help

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: An ER doctor is trying to solve why a student is having difficulty breathing, and what his fraternity brothers might be hiding; a man falls off a roof and is impaled by a shovel; a police officer has a heart attack that endangers the hospital staff.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Over-Juiced
programme.desc: A geriatric playboy comes into the ER with a minor injury that quickly turns deadly; a health fanatic's juice diet leaves him in a comatose state; doctors juggling multiple critical patients nearly misdiagnose one who has suddenly deteriorated.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Bikini
programme.desc: A resort doctor must treat a man critically injured by a boat propeller; a discharged patient sets off a deadly chain of events by getting a ride from his designated driver; the ER comes to a standstill when the computers and the head nurse are down.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A career criminal lands back in prison, where he pulls off a daring escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A prison lifer falls in love with a guard, and she helps break him out.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: A husband and wife are trapped while touring an ice cave, with no apparent way out.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: This second "follow-up" episode will allow for a much deeper investigation of life after the intervention.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: The stories of two men on the verge of destroying themselves.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Annie is anorexic and bulimic. Now her fiancé Kevin, desperately wants an intervention because he's afraid that Annie's eating disorders will kill her.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Chuckie, 28, is the son of a famous musician, and was born into the rock 'n' roll world of the 70's. Surrounded by famous musicians and privilege all his life.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Gina is bright, fun-loving, and ambitious, but she's losing a difficult battle with drugs and compulsive gambling.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A pregnant teen is admitted to a mental hospital after threatening suicide but is found dead days later. Dr. G must dig deep to uncover what took Claudia’s life.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: While at dinner, Virginia Lowery chokes on a fishbone. Later that night, she suddenly can’t breathe and dies. Virginia’s family hopes that Dr. G can provide them with closure.

programme.title: Tanks!
programme.desc: The T34 medium tank was one of the technological wonders of World War II. Designed, built, and used in Russia, the T34 stunned the invading German army and prevented it from seizing Moscow. The Third Reich’s attempt to clone it failed.

programme.title: Tanks!
programme.desc: The legendary Panther and Tiger tanks of World War II have become synonymous with the Wehrmacht, the trident forces of Nazi Germany, that countered Allied forces on the Eastern and Western fronts of World War II.

programme.title: Tanks!
programme.desc: All though it seems common place in the army's of today, the tank is a surprisingly new invention. Tanks first saw action less than a century ago in the first world war. The Tiger was the most complete fighting machine of WWII.

programme.title: Tanks!
programme.desc: Necessity is the mother of invention, and such was with self-propelled artillery vehicles, born from the severe conditions on the Russian front. These vehicles were rushed into production from war-ravaged German factories to shore up defensive lines.

programme.title: Tanks!
programme.desc: Between the years 1941-1945, Nazi Germany and Soviet Russia engaged in battles whose bells of destruction still ring to this day. Much was at stake in an ideological war that would rock the foundations of humanity.

programme.title: Tanks!
programme.desc: During the dark days of August 1942, a ray of hope still existed for Hitler and the Nazi’s. Stalingrad would prove a turning point in the War however, though it would take years of arduous fighting for the Allied forces to achieve victory.

programme.title: Tanks!
programme.desc: Hitler’s surprise Ardennes Counteroffensive in 1944 represented the last major German offensive military campaign and was a battle Hitler hoped would allow him to eventually free up resources for his forces in the East.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Orbit

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier

programme.title: The Tesla Files

programme.title: The Tesla Files

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre desnudo y delirante está en el porche de su vecino. Un conductor trata de correr, pero deja los zapatos atrás. Una pareja tiene dificultad en seguir adelante después de un evento trágico.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una familia llama a la policía porque hay un extraño en su casa. La policía encuentra cosas desagradables en el coche del hijo de una señora. Las tensiones entre un joven y su padrastro llegan a su límite.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La posible sentencia de ir a prisión asusta a un sospechoso y huye. Los oficiales ayudan a unos padres a razonar. La policía intenta detener a una mujer furiosa que atacó a su exnovio con un martillo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se descubre el botín de un ladrón que insiste que lo iba a donar. Encuentran objetos ilícitos en el coche de un supuesto aficionado de beisbol. Muchos problemas vienen por tener vidrios teñidos.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un retén termina mal cuando un conductor que parece cooperar se irrita. Un delincuente de tráfico es capturado con más que una licencia suspendida. Una mujer problemática ignora el aviso de desalojo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer desafiante toma una mala decisión mientras su novio no interviene. Una etiqueta falsa y una historia confusa no pasan la prueba de indagación. Un padre y un hijo pelean en público.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía enfrenta a una pareja en una parada de autobús y todo se complica. Él le llama a su novia para cancelar una fiesta. Se reportó que conducía ebria, pero ella jura que es una trampa del exmarido.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso de robo vuelve para apoyar a su socio en el delito. Una investigación de autos da lugar a persecución. Un tipo que admite haber consumido drogas dice que lo hace de forma responsable.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se persigue a un hombre en un ciclomotor chatarra que no corre más de 40mph. Una mujer culpa a su previa relación tóxica por lo que hay en su auto. Un conductor errático pone a los oficiales en alerta.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución nocturna termina en el jardín de una casa y la policía busca pistas. Una mujer harta habla al grano con un hombre que evita la realidad. Un policía anima a un veterano con mala suerte.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se escapa en el coche de su amigo cuando es atrapado en algo sospechoso. Niega que la ropa del coche sea suya antes de preguntárselo. Un hombre tira por el aire y pone nerviosos a sus vecinos.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor que huye forja su propio camino para escapar. Los oficiales aconsejan al comerciante de autos que invierta en más cámaras de seguridad. Un oficial separa un problema doméstico explosivo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los pasajeros salen cayéndose uno por uno durante una persecución. Un sospechoso tiene algo dudoso en su pantalón. Los ocupantes de un vehículo robado dicen que son víctimas de una mujer misteriosa.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un intento de fuga termina con un camión destrozado y una visita al hospital. Un hombre reconoce cuidadosamente que los objetos son y no son de él. Un oficial calma una lucha doméstica que empezó con la ropa sucia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La investigación nocturna de un hombre produce resultados inesperados. Dos hombres mintieron en vano porque un oficial los reconoció. La policía dice a una mujer para cambiar si ella quiere proteger a sus perros.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La elección de la vestimenta hace que sea fácil seguir a un ciclista fugitivo. Encarcelan a su esposa y no parece preocupado. Una pelea entre esposos aumenta cuando un joven inocente se involucra.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso huye mientras llegan los oficiales. Un consumidor de metanfetamina se niega a cooperar. Un marido malhumorado es arrestado por marihuana y su esposa patea su moto.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales despliegan una unidad K-9 cuando un sospechoso de robo se refugia en un limonero. Un sospechoso busca refugio en la casa de un extraño. Un motociclista sin licencia no quiere escuchar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales tratan de encontrar sentido de una compra convertida en pelea. Una mujer pide ayuda cuando su novio se deshace de las cenizas de su marido. Un hombre sin camisa tiene una mala actitud.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un ciclista cae al pavimento cuando huye de una patrulla. Un divorcio provoca el enfrentamiento entre un Corvette y un Mustang. Un perro rabioso se lleva lo mejor de una disputa doméstica.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un cliente de mal genio no hace caso y regresa a casa con la oferta taser. Un hombre incoherente no puede explicar por qué golpeo a un hombre. Una parada, un camión lleno de perros, y un maniático.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre armado no sabe recibir críticas fuertes. Un ciclista intenta perder a un policía y luego finge ser otra persona. Los oficiales buscan la verdad de un conductor que se fugó cuando atropelló.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un policía pelea con un drogadicto que se cree Hulk. Los policías atrapan a un conductor que transporta drogas cuando se queda sin gasolina. Un sospechoso se enoja cuando le quitan los calcetines.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución de auto acaba porque un poste de concreto no se puede romper. Un hombre emocional solo quiere un beso de la policía. Hay una melé cuando una mujer se apodera del celular de su novio.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución acaba en inundación cuando el conductor choca con un hidrante. Un sospechoso de violencia doméstica no acepta la culpa. La policía halla mucho contrabando de una pareja armada.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La unidad K-9 responde cuando un pistolero sube a la azotea. Un intercambio de drogas va mal cuando el traficante intenta dejar su alijo. Un borracho destroza el auto de su vecino.

programme.title: Cops
